LanguageData.WULA_Start_Scenario.label: Wula Empire Advance Team
LanguageData.WULA_Start_Scenario.description: The Wula Empire Development Agency's fleet has arrived at the rimworld, and an advance team responsible for establishing a forward outpost has been deployed to the planet.
LanguageData.WULA_Start_Scenario.scenario.summary: Start the game with 2 mechanical Wulas as initial colonists, accompanied by an outpost beacon to summon a small prefabricated forward outpost.
LanguageData.WULA_ArmedShuttle_Start_Scenario.label: Wula Empire Survey Team
LanguageData.WULA_ArmedShuttle_Start_Scenario.descrip: The Wula Empire Development Agency's fleet has arrived at the rimworld, and an investigator specializing in local ecology surveys, along with their shuttle, has been deployed to the planet's surface.
LanguageData.WULA_ArmedShuttle_Start_Scenario.scenari: Start the game with 1 well-equipped mechanical Wula and their private shuttle, but with fewer starting resources.
